sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114820" key="xruseoste/fanos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσεο-στέφᾰνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χρυσοστέφανος</ref> </xr> (q. v.).</sense> </entryFree>
